title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts reviews Ideogram 4.0, claiming it excels at rendering text within generated images compared to Midjourney and other models. He notes it beats competitors on certain leaderboards like DesignArena and is available for free.
writeup: The video evaluates Ideogram 4.0 as a free image generator, focusing on its handling of text rendering, a longstanding weak point in AI image generation. Jack Roberts argues that Ideogram 4.0 outperforms Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on certain benchmarks and positions it as a viable free option for producing brand assets. The takeaway is that reliable in-image text places Ideogram 4.0 ahead of paid competitors for design work that depends on legible typography.
